meaning: v.雕刻,(线条,文字,图案)于一硬面上,深印于(心上),使铭记,铭刻
examples: The shop will also engrave your child's name on the side.
It is difficult to engrave in marble.
He had the jeweler engrave his name on the back of the watch.
Engrave expensive accessories like car stereos, cellular phones, compact disc changers, external speakers, etc.
Men are trained to draw and engrave Chinese characters, which are then set into a type-page and printed.
